title: Smooth Irish Oatmeal Porridge
description: A warm and comforting breakfast porridge made with Irish oatmeal, perfect for a cold morning.

ingredients.name: Irish oatmeal
ingredients.notes: Steel-cut or rolled oats work well too.

instructions: Combine the oatmeal and water in a medium saucepan.
Add a pinch of salt and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the oats have absorbed most of the water and have a creamy consistency.
If using silk, stir it in during the last minute of cooking.
Serve the oatmeal hot, topped with your choice of ingredients such as fruit, nuts, or honey.
